description: Serum creatinine percent increase from baseline is less than 50%.

description: Most recent serum creatinine absolute value is ≤ 221 μmol/L.

name: Serum creatinine increase 50%–100%
description: Serum creatinine percent increase from baseline is in the range 50% to 100%.

description: Most recent serum creatinine absolute value is in the range 221 to 309 μmol/L.

description: Serum creatinine has increased more than 100% relative to baseline during SGLT2i treatment.
